title: Overseas Employment Certificate (OEC)
content: The Overseas Employment Certificate (OEC) is a document issued by the Philippine Overseas Employment Administration (POEA) which serves as a travel clearance for a worker leaving to assume overseas employment. The OEC exempts the worker from payment of travel tax amounting to P1,620 and airport tax of P550.

metadata.source_file: 2002 POEA Rules on Overseas Employment of OFWs Primer.pdf
